dashboard.label: SOC Threat Detection Dashboard
dashboard.description: Unified view of brute force, DNS C2, privilege escalation, PowerShell, and HTTP anomaly alerts — mapped to MITRE ATT&CK

search.query: index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | stats count by src_ip, user | where count > 5 | stats count as alert_count
index=main sourcetype=dns | stats count dc(query) as unique_domains by src_ip | where count > 100 AND unique_domains > 50 | stats count as alert_count
index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4672 | stats count by Account_Name, Logon_Type, src_ip | where count > 3 | stats count as alert_count
index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4104 | search ScriptBlockText IN ("*-enc*","*bypass*","*hidden*","*DownloadString*","*IEX*","*Invoke-Expression*") | stats count as alert_count
index=main sourcetype=access_combined | stats count avg(bytes) as avg_bytes by src_ip, uri_path, status | where count > 200 AND status=200 | stats count as alert_count

index=main ((sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password") OR (sourcetype=dns) OR (sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4672) OR (sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4104) OR (sourcetype=access_combined)) | eval detection=case( sourcetype="linux_secure", "Brute Force", sourcetype="dns", "DNS C2", (sourcetype="WinEventLog" AND EventCode="4672"), "Privilege Escalation", (sourcetype="WinEventLog" AND EventCode="4104"), "PowerShell", sourcetype="access_combined", "HTTP Anomaly", true(), "Other" ) | timechart span=1h count by detection
index=main ((sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password") OR (sourcetype=dns) OR (sourcetype=access_combined)) | eval src=coalesce(src_ip, clientip) | stats count by src | sort -count | head 10

index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | stats count by src_ip, user | where count > 5 | eval severity=if(count>20,"HIGH","MEDIUM") | eval mitre="T1110 – Brute Force" | sort -count | head 20 | table src_ip, user, count, severity, mitre | rename src_ip as "Source IP", user as "Target User", count as "Failed Attempts", severity as "Severity", mitre as "MITRE Technique"

index=main sourcetype=dns | stats count dc(query) as unique_domains by src_ip | where count > 100 AND unique_domains > 50 | eval mitre="T1071.004 – DNS" | eval alert="Possible DNS C2 / DGA" | sort -count | table src_ip, count, unique_domains, alert, mitre | rename src_ip as "Source IP", count as "Total Queries", unique_domains as "Unique Domains", alert as "Alert", mitre as "MITRE Technique"

index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4672 | stats count by Account_Name, Logon_Type, src_ip | where count > 3 | eval mitre="T1078 – Valid Accounts" | eval alert="Sensitive Privilege Assignment" | sort -count | table Account_Name, Logon_Type, src_ip, count, alert, mitre | rename Account_Name as "Account", Logon_Type as "Logon Type", src_ip as "Source IP", count as "Occurrences", alert as "Alert", mitre as "MITRE Technique"

index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4104 | search ScriptBlockText IN ("*-enc*","*bypass*","*hidden*","*DownloadString*","*IEX*","*Invoke-Expression*") | stats count by ComputerName, User, ScriptBlockText | eval mitre="T1059.001 – PowerShell" | eval severity="HIGH" | sort -count | head 20 | table ComputerName, User, ScriptBlockText, count, severity, mitre | rename ComputerName as "Host", User as "User", ScriptBlockText as "Script Block", count as "Count", severity as "Severity", mitre as "MITRE Technique"

index=main sourcetype=access_combined | stats count avg(bytes) as avg_bytes by src_ip, uri_path, status | where count > 200 AND status=200 | eval avg_bytes=round(avg_bytes,0) | eval mitre="T1071.001 – Web Protocols" | eval alert=if(avg_bytes>500000,"Possible Data Exfiltration","High Volume HTTP") | sort -count | head 20 | table src_ip, uri_path, count, avg_bytes, alert, mitre | rename src_ip as "Source IP", uri_path as "URI Path", count as "Request Count", avg_bytes as "Avg Bytes", alert as "Alert", mitre as "MITRE Technique"

panel.title: 🕐 Threat Activity — Alerts by Hour of Day (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=main ((sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password") OR (sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4672) OR (sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4104)) | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H:00") | eval detection=case( sourcetype="linux_secure", "Brute Force", (sourcetype="WinEventLog" AND EventCode="4672"), "Privilege Escalation", (sourcetype="WinEventLog" AND EventCode="4104"), "PowerShell", true(), "Other" ) | stats count by hour, detection | sort hour
